title: TooHard
description: Makes Minecraft Insanely Easy to beat (Check desc. for tutorial)
body:
This mod will make minecraft insanely easy to beat. So if you suck at minecraft, this is perfect for you. Here's the tutorial

1.Break a bunch of dirt.

2.Put 1 peice of dirt in the inventory crafting or crafting
table to make a Game Block.

3.Place the game block down and break it. You will get good armor, weapons/tools, good food, and blocks essential to beating the game. Make a lot, as one block won't drop all the items at once.

4.construct the end frame and put the eyes of ender in the slots.

5.go to the end and defeat the ender dragon by waiting for it to get close to the ground and hitting it with your sword or tool.



And that's how to do it! If you have any questions, leave them in the comments!
